description: Decree fragment. The beginnings of three lines are preserved on recto (mentioning al-Ramla): الرملة وف . . م . . من ظهر . . وتحصيله اليه. The ends of two lines are preserved on verso: . . . ه كما هو اهله . . . Reused for an unidentified text in Arabic script written in between the lines.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
